Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Discovery
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Future US, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Response To Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond to Plaintiff's Special and Form Interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $677.50, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Continued To Oct-24-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment; Application For Right To Attach Order.
Off Calendar Jun-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Future US, Inc.'s Application For Writ Of Attachment is ordered off calendar. The motion was not timely filed and served as it was filed on May 16, 2008. The first day this motion could have been heard is June 20, 2008. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
